settings.text: Get your car on the schedule.
Book online for the fastest route, or call the shop — Alicia answers 7am to 6pm weekdays and 8am to 2pm Saturdays. Most jobs booked within two business days.

settings.title: Book online
settings.text:
Fastest path — send the car, the concern, and a preferred day.

We reply same-day with an available slot.

settings.title: Shop
settings.text:
4420 SE Milwaukie Ave

Portland, OR 97202

Free shuttle inside a 5-mile radius

settings.title: Inner SE Portland.
settings.description: Corner of SE Milwaukie and Bybee. Customer parking in front and along the side of the building.

settings.question: What info should I have ready?
settings.answer: Year, make, model, mileage, and the reason for the visit. For check-engine lights, a photo of the dash or the scan-tool code is helpful. If you have service history with another shop, bring it — we'll log it to your record.

settings.question: Can I wait in the lobby while you work?
settings.answer: Yes for most quick services — oil changes, tire rotations, alignments, basic inspections. The lobby has good coffee, fast Wi-Fi, and actual chairs. For longer repairs we offer a complimentary shuttle within five miles and a loaner car on a first-come basis.

settings.question: How do loaner cars and the shuttle work?
settings.answer: The shuttle covers a five-mile radius from the shop — we'll take you home or to work and pick you up when your car's ready. Loaners are available for repairs estimated over two hours; reserve one when you book. Both are free.

settings.question: How does the warranty claim process work?
settings.answer: If something we repaired fails inside two years or 24,000 miles, bring the car back and we'll fix it at no charge — parts and labor. Keep the original invoice (we'll have it in our system regardless). No paperwork fuss.

settings.question: Do you handle fleet accounts?
settings.answer: Yes — small business fleets of 5 or more vehicles get priority scheduling, a dedicated service advisor, 15% off labor, and consolidated monthly invoicing. Email hello@torqueauto.co to set up an account.

settings.title: Prefer email?
settings.text:
hello@torqueauto.co

Year, make, model, and the concern is enough — we'll reply with a quote and available slots.
Most slots available within two business days. Free diagnostic on check-engine lights.
